title: astragalus cellatus
intro: Astragalus cellatus, also known as the Cellated milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. It belongs to the legume family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cellatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus cellatus is typically prepared as an herbal decoction or capsule, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
